latin: Raius amicos suos monuit: 'si quis vos rogaverit num deus sitis, dicite ITA!' haec verba dixit postquam unus ex eis negaverat se deum esse et fulgure paene interfectus erat.

questions.prompt: What advice did Ray give his friends?
questions.target: If asked if you're a god, say yes
choices: If asked if you're a god, say yes

questions.prompt: What happened when someone denied being a god?
questions.target: He was almost killed by lightning
choices: He was almost killed by lightning

translation: Ray warned his friends: 'If anyone asks you whether you are a god, say YES!' He said these words after one of them had denied being a god and was almost killed by lightning.
